headline: God of War Laufey is coming to the PS5
summary: Sony revealed the next God of War title, 'God of War Laufey,' at its State of Play showcase. Developed by Sony Santa Monica Studio, the game is set for release on PS5. No specific launch date has been announced yet.

headline: Remedy’s Control sequel launches in September
summary: Control Resonant, Remedy's sequel, is set to release on September 24th, 2026. The launch date was revealed during PlayStation's State of Play event. The game's story stars Dylan Faden, previously imprisoned in the first installment.

headline: Here’s seven bloody minutes of Wolverine on the PS5
summary: Sony showcased new Marvel's Wolverine gameplay at its State of Play event. The Insomniac Games title is a PS5 exclusive, launching on September 15th. The footage features Logan in his iconic yellow outfit, engaging in combat.

headline: PlayStation State of Play June 2026: All the news and trailers
summary: Sony's State of Play showcase aired on June 2nd, providing new PlayStation announcements. The event preceded Summer Game Fest, revealing upcoming game trailers. It comes amidst rising PS5 costs and evolving brand strategy.

headline: Control Resonant Release Date Announced in New Trailer, Costs $60
summary: The release date for Control Resonant was officially unveiled. A new trailer premiered during the PlayStation State of Play event. The upcoming game will be priced at $60.

headline: Save 56% Off the Logitech G29 Racing Wheel and Pedal Set, Perfect for Forza Horizon 6 on PC
summary: Get a 56% discount on the Logitech G29 Racing Wheel and Pedal Set. This deal is perfect for playing Forza Horizon 6 on PC. The product is refurbished directly from Logitech with a 1-year warranty.

headline: Marvel's Wolverine: Who's Who In the State of Play Trailer
summary: An analysis breaks down key characters seen in the new Marvel's Wolverine footage. Notable X-Men characters include Sabretooth, Omega Red, and Ogun. The trailer was showcased during the recent State of Play event.

headline: Marvel Cinematic Universe Is 'Back to Phase Zero' With Avengers: Doomsday, Director Says
summary: Co-director Joe Russo states the MCU is 'back to phase zero' with Avengers: Doomsday. This remark signals a significant reset for the cinematic universe. The new film aims to redefine the MCU's direction.

headline: Henry Nowak arrest footage raises 'serious questions for police', PM says
summary: The Prime Minister states Henry Nowak arrest footage raises 'serious questions' for police. Sir Keir Starmer called for an inquiry into the role of racism in decision-making. The incident led to clashes between protesters and police in Southampton.

headline: Key moments from police bodycam footage
summary: BBC Verify analyzed police bodycam footage of Henry Nowak's incident. The video captures key moments after Nowak was stabbed by Vickrum Digwa. The analysis highlights critical events from the released police recording.

headline: US says it fired missile at Iran-bound oil tanker
summary: The US military confirms it fired a missile at an Iran-bound oil tanker. The vessel's engine room was hit after its crew 'ignored repeated warnings'. This incident marks a potential escalation of tensions in the region.

headline: Three quarters of workers not on track for 'moderate' pension income, report suggests
summary: A new report indicates 75% of workers are not on track for a 'moderate' pension income. A moderate lifestyle in retirement costs £32,700 annually for one person. For two people, a moderate retirement requires £45,400 per year.
